Dance & Performance

Bharatanatyam
Guru Praveen Kumar · Chithkala Dance School · 2015 – Present

Eleven years of classical training translating into storytelling, audience connection, and visual identity. Dance taught me how to build a personal brand before I knew what a brand was.

Performed at Konark Dance Festival and Dristi National Dance Festival
Invited to perform for corporate and cultural organisations across India
Audiences from 500 to 200,000 — designed all promotional materials and managed social media for performances
Assisted in organising Investiture Ceremonies and Arangetrams
Also Experienced In
Presentation and public speaking for large audiences
Offline event promotion through flyers and reels
Volunteered at multiple cultural programmes — logistics and design
Led a 5-member creative team — won 1st place in school board design competitions
Created posters for school events, dance programmes, and cultural projects

08

About

I'm a Bachelor of Design student at RV University, Bengaluru — with a background spanning classical dance, photography, art direction, and brand strategy.

My work lives at the intersection of visual storytelling and marketing. Whether I'm on a music video set, behind a camera, or building content for a brand, every decision is intentional — rooted in how design and narrative shape perception.

I've been promoting myself since my first Bharatanatyam performance. That's where I learned that a great visual and a great story are the same thing.
